answers.brand_info: The Momentum Engine by Marcus Vale. A calm, direct, no-hype operating-system brand for solo operators who are done confusing motion with progress. Voice: plain, grounded, quietly confident. Method attribution: the Trevor Otts Direct-Response method.
answers.product_info: The Momentum Engine, a self-paced operating-system course, $197. CTA https://example.com/momentum/checkout . Thirty short lessons + twelve operating templates + a weekly cadence.
answers.upsell_desc: The Momentum Accelerator, a done-with-you 30-day guided-install sprint, $497.
answers.downsell_desc: The Momentum Accelerator Recordings Vault, self-paced recordings, $147.
answers.bump_desc: The 10-Minute Momentum Reset, a pocket audio pack, $27.
answers.high_ticket_desc: The Sovereign Operator Mentorship, one-to-one operating-structure rebuild, $12,000.
